"product_id": "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@x86_64"}, "product_reference": "libarchive-main@x86_64", "relates_to_product_reference": "Red Hat Hardened Images"}]}, "vulnerabilities": [{"acknowledgments": [{"names": ["shaohan.X"]}], "cve": "CVE-2026-16517", "cwe": {"id": "CWE-190", "name": "Integer Overflow or Wraparound"}, "discovery_date": "2026-07-04T04:42:50+00:00", "ids": [{"system_name": "Red Hat Bugzilla ID", "text": "2505492"}], "notes": [{"category": "description", "text": "A signed integer overflow vulnerability was found in libarchive's ZIP writer. In the archive_write_zip_header function in archive_write_set_format_zip.c, when ZIP encryption is enabled and the entry file size is close to INT64_MAX, the addition of the encryption overhead to the entry size overflows int64_t, resulting in undefined behavior. This could lead to incorrect Zip64 extension decisions or potential memory corruption.", "title": "Vulnerability description"}, {"category": "summary", "text": "libarchive: libarchive: Signed Integer Overflow in archive_write_zip_header", "title": "Vulnerability summary"}, {"category": "other", "text": "Red Hat Product Security rates this issue as Low severity. The vulnerability is in the ZIP write path only and requires both ZIP encryption to be enabled and a file size near INT64_MAX, making real-world exploitation highly unlikely. The resulting undefined behavior could theoretically cause incorrect Zip64 extension decisions or a crash, but the conditions are too contrived for practical exploitation.", "title": "Statement"}, {"category": "general", "text": "The CVSS score(s) listed for this vulnerability do not reflect the associated product's status, and are included for informational purposes to better understand the severity of this vulnerability.", "title": "CVSS score applicability"}], "product_status": {"fixed": ["Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@aarch64", "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@src", "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@x86_64"]}, "references": [{"category": "self", "summary": "Canonical URL", "url": "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-16517"}, {"category": "external", "summary": "RHBZ#2505492", "url": "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2505492"}, {"category": "external", "summary": "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-16517", "url": "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-16517"}, {"category": "external", "summary": "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-16517", "url": "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-16517"}], "release_date": "2026-07-03T00:00:00+00:00", "remediations": [{"category": "vendor_fix", "date": "2026-07-22T18:12:39+00:00", "details": "For details on how to apply this update, which includes the changes described in this advisory, refer to:
https://images.redhat.com/", "product_ids": ["Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@aarch64", "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@src", "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@x86_64"], "restart_required": {"category": "none"}, "url": "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:43818"}], "scores": [{"cvss_v3": {"attackComplexity": "HIGH", "attackVector": "LOCAL", "availabilityImpact": "LOW", "baseScore": 2.9, "baseSeverity": "LOW", "confidentialityImpact": "NONE", "integrityImpact": "NONE", "privilegesRequired": "NONE", "scope": "UNCHANGED", "userInteraction": "NONE", "vectorString": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L", "version": "3.1"}, "products": ["Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@aarch64", "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@src", "Red Hat Hardened Images:libarchive-main@x86_64"]}], "threats": [{"category": "impact", "details": "Low"}], "title": "libarchive: libarchive: Signed Integer Overflow in archive_write_zip_header"}]}

title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat Hardened Images RPMs Security Update
